title: Maximum Number of Coins Within Capacity

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

hints.text: Use dynamic programming to solve this problem

editorial.title: Maximum Number of Coins Within Capacity Editorial
editorial.intuition: The problem is a classic example of a dynamic programming problem
editorial.bruteForce: The brute force approach would be to try every possible combination of coins and return the maximum number of coins that can be put in the bag
editorial.betterSolution: We can use dynamic programming to solve this problem in O(n*m) time
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution uses a 2D table to store the maximum number of coins that can be put in the bag for each subproblem
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The dynamic programming approach ensures that we consider every possible combination of coins and return the maximum number of coins that can be put in the bag
editorial.dryRun: To solve the problem, we create a 2D table dp where dp[i][j] is the maximum number of coins that can be put in a bag of capacity j using the first i coin denominations

functionSignature.python: int bag(self, capacity: int, coins: list[int]) -> int
